productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men White Shirt
description: CompositionWhite shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, concealed button placket, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, and has embroidery above the curved hemFitComfortWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using a mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron do not iron directly on print/embroideryImpeccable cuts and a luxury construction is a winning sartorial combination - and this shirt from united colors of benetton has both. Lead yourself to a new generation of style and sophistication with this cotton shirt. Pair it with straight fit formal trousers, classy accessories and shiny oxfords. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
